xpath.attribute: s_title parallax s_parallax_is_fixed pt24 pb24 nx-contact-hero

div.t: No default Contact Us team is configured in Helpdesk yet.
We could not submit your request. Please try again.

input.name: name
input.t-att-value: request.params.get('name') or (request.env.user.sudo().partner_id.name if request.env.user and request.env.user.id != request.website.user_id.id else ((request.env['website.visitor']._get_visitor_from_request().partner_id.name) or ''))

input.name: phone
input.t-att-value: request.params.get('phone') or (request.env.user.sudo().partner_id.phone if request.env.user and request.env.user.id != request.website.user_id.id else ((request.env['website.visitor']._get_visitor_from_request().partner_id.phone) or ''))

input.name: email_from
input.t-att-value: request.params.get('email_from') or (request.env.user.sudo().partner_id.email if request.env.user and request.env.user.id != request.website.user_id.id else ((request.env['website.visitor']._get_visitor_from_request().partner_id.email) or ''))

input.name: company
input.t-att-value: request.params.get('company') or (request.env.user.sudo().partner_id.commercial_partner_id.name if request.env.user and request.env.user.id != request.website.user_id.id else ((request.env['website.visitor']._get_visitor_from_request().partner_id.commercial_partner_id.name) or ''))

xpath.expr: //section[hasclass('s_text_block')]//div[hasclass('col-lg-4') and hasclass('offset-lg-1') and hasclass('mt-4') and hasclass('mt-lg-0')]

div.p: Your message has been sent successfully to the NextEra team.
We will review it and get back to you shortly using the details you shared.

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-sm-row gap-3 justify-content-center justify-content-lg-start

div.p: Access only the courses assigned to your contact and continue your learning journey.

t.t-esc: 'الدورات المسجل بها' if nx_is_arabic else 'Enrolled courses'

div.div: No e-learning courses are assigned to this contact yet.

div.p: Browse articles, guides, and answers from your support knowledge base.

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3
nx-knowledge-team-card p-3 h-100 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center gap-3

div.p: This team is linked to your portal knowledge.

t.div: No website-published helpdesk team with Knowledge is configured yet.

div.p: Track service hours, ticket quotas, and contract status.

t.t-esc: 'إجمالي الساعات المخصصة' if nx_is_arabic else 'Total Allocated Hours'

div.p: Review order references, dates, and totals in one clean view.

t.div: There are currently no sales orders for your account.
There are currently no sales orders for your account.

xpath.attribute: {{ 'row o_portal_sale_sidebar nx-order-detail-shell' if request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty' else 'row o_portal_sale_sidebar' }}
{{ 'col-12 mt-0' if request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty' else 'col-12 col-lg-8 col-xxl-9 mt-5 mt-lg-0' }}

t.div: Could not create ticket. Please try again.

div.p: Track all support requests and follow their stage changes.
Track all support requests and follow their stage changes.

span.t-attf-class: nx-severity-badge #{'severity-high' if ticket.severity == 'high' else ('severity-medium' if ticket.severity == 'medium' else 'severity-low')}

t.t-esc: 'عالٍ' if (nx_is_arabic and ticket.severity == 'high') else ('متوسط' if (nx_is_arabic and ticket.severity == 'medium') else ('منخفض' if nx_is_arabic else ('High' if ticket.severity == 'high' else ('Medium' if ticket.severity == 'medium' else 'Low'))))

span.t-attf-class: nx-stage-badge #{'stage-cancelled' if 'cancel' in stage_name_lower else ('stage-solved' if ('solved' in stage_name_lower or 'done' in stage_name_lower or ticket.stage_id.fold) else ('stage-progress' if ('progress' in stage_name_lower or 'work' in stage_name_lower) else ('stage-new' if 'new' in stage_name_lower else 'stage-default')))}
badge rounded-pill fw-normal #{'text-bg-success' if ticket.stage_id.fold else 'text-bg-primary'}

div.t-if: ticket.team_id.allow_portal_ticket_closing and not ticket.stage_id.fold and not ticket.closed_by_partner

div.p: We hope to have addressed your request satisfactorily. If you no longer need our assistance, please close this ticket. Thank you for your collaboration.

xpath.attribute: {{ 'row mt16 o_project_portal_sidebar nx-ticket-detail-shell' if request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty' else 'row mt16 o_project_portal_sidebar' }}
{{ 'o_portal_content col-12 mt-0' if request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty' else 'o_portal_content col-12 col-lg-8 col-xxl-9 mt-5 mt-lg-0' }}

t.t-esc: 'Ticket Detail' if not nx_is_arabic else 'تفاصيل التذكرة'
'Assigned Team' if not nx_is_arabic else 'الفريق المسؤول'

span.t-attf-class: nx-severity-badge #{'severity-high' if ticket.severity == 'high' else ('severity-medium' if ticket.severity == 'medium' else 'severity-low')}

t.t-esc: 'عالٍ' if (nx_is_arabic and ticket.severity == 'high') else ('متوسط' if (nx_is_arabic and ticket.severity == 'medium') else ('منخفض' if nx_is_arabic else ('High' if ticket.severity == 'high' else ('Medium' if ticket.severity == 'medium' else 'Low'))))
'Expected Closing Time' if not nx_is_arabic else 'وقت الإغلاق المتوقع'
'Time Spent' if not nx_is_arabic else 'الوقت المستغرق'

small.t-attf-class: nx-stage-badge #{'stage-cancelled' if 'cancel' in stage_name_lower else ('stage-solved' if ('solved' in stage_name_lower or 'done' in stage_name_lower or ticket.stage_id.fold) else ('stage-progress' if ('progress' in stage_name_lower or 'work' in stage_name_lower) else ('stage-new' if 'new' in stage_name_lower else 'stage-default')))}
small.title: Current stage of this ticket

small.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill smaller #{'text-bg-info' if ticket.stage_id.fold else 'text-bg-light bg-200'}
small.title: Current stage of this ticket

t.t-esc: 'Final Feedback' if not nx_is_arabic else 'الملاحظات النهائية'
'أنشئ تذكرة جديدة' if nx_is_arabic else 'Create a New Ticket'
'شارك فريقنا كل التفاصيل التي تحتاجها وسنوجّه الطلب إلى الفريق الصحيح بسرعة.' if nx_is_arabic else 'Tell our team what you need and we will route your request to the right helpdesk team fast.'
teams.filtered(lambda t: t.id == selected_team_id)[:1].name if selected_team_id else (teams[:1].name if teams else ('غير متاح' if nx_is_arabic else 'Unavailable'))

div.t: No portal helpdesk team is configured.
No helpdesk team is linked to your active warranty contract.

t.t-esc: 'اكتب موضوعًا واضحًا، اختر نوع المشكلة، ثم أضف الوصف المختصر أو الكامل حسب الحاجة.' if nx_is_arabic else 'Add a clear subject, choose the issue type, then describe what you need in as much detail as necessary.'

input.name: subject
input.t-att-placeholder: 'مثال: مشكلة في تفعيل الضمان' if nx_is_arabic else 'Example: Warranty activation issue'

t.t-esc: 'اختر نوع المشكلة' if nx_is_arabic else 'Select issue type'
'لا توجد لدى شركتك حتى الآن اتفاقية ضمان نشطة مرتبطة بفريق مكتب المساعدة.' if nx_is_arabic else 'Your company does not have an active warranty contract linked to a helpdesk team yet.'

textarea.name: description
textarea.t-att-placeholder: 'اشرح المشكلة أو الطلب بالتفصيل، وأضف أي خطوات أو معلومات مفيدة.' if nx_is_arabic else 'Describe the issue or request in detail, including any useful steps or context.'

xpath.attribute: (request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty') and ((sortby == option) and 'background:#dff4f6; background-image:none; color:#0a666a;' or 'background:#ffffff; background-image:none; color:#214251;') or ''

(request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty') and ((filterby == option) and 'background:#dff4f6; background-image:none; color:#0a666a;' or 'background:#ffffff; background-image:none; color:#214251;') or ''

(request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty') and ((groupby == option) and 'background:#dff4f6; background-image:none; color:#0a666a;' or 'background:#ffffff; background-image:none; color:#214251;') or ''

(request and request.website and request.website.portal_mode == 'warranty') and ((search_in == input_value['input']) and 'background:#dff4f6; background-image:none; color:#0a666a;' or 'background:#ffffff; background-image:none; color:#214251;') or ''
